content: Initially, with the AI translation, the Keeper's creation was called the 'Spring of Akut'. With the new human translations, it was changed to Acushnet, so I figured Akut was just AI weirdness. However, there's a discrepancy in the voicelines of the prologue, and chapter 9. In the prologue the voice actor calls it Acushnet, but the chapter 9, they say Akut. So was it originally Akut in cn, and then changed to Acushnet? Or is the voice line in chapter 9 a mistake?
thread_title: (English Translation/Lore) Is it supposed to be Akut, or Acushnet?

content:
這個沒什麼人在乎的角落默默地被上了強度

用電腦版滑鼠滾輪也會失效滑不動<:flop2:1356053072924774421> 
不是最優先的改動但如果有空希望能改回之前的絲滑<:please:1356053110375714817>
支持
點讚人表示不滿
為什麼我點個讚也要被上強度
肉眼可見的難滑
真的覺得有點討厭了斷觸4、5次才能滑動一次<:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
被暗算了沒有之前順滑的錄影可以對比<:scared2:1356085635374383145>
戈雅已反馈🙏
哈喽，确实存在问题，已经安排修复啦，下次更新会放出🥰
✅「已回答」點讚紀錄變卡頓了
确实

We have had the channel suggestion channel for a while now and still no changes. Instead we get a profanity filtering bot which I consider unnecessary considering the context of this game.
I hope staff will listen to what the community wants and do better in the future.

The profanity filter is going to do nothing bluntly speaking, people will find a way to swear on their own terms either way, and if it's to prevent malicious behavior, it definitely won't stop passive aggressive comments from happening and it has been happening <:flop2:1356053072924774421>
If staff are insistent on these changes, I request a poll to get the server's option.
Opinion* 🤓

Thank you for your suggestions. Goya will be reading the suggestions in the channel this week🙏 
I'm very sorry, I've been preparing for version 2.3 recently, so I haven't had time to deal with it yet🥲 .
If you have any other suggestions, you can also send them to the channel first, and I will check them as soon as possible💗 
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1385040039448412170
Regarding the "profitability filtering bot" you mentioned, could you please explain the situation🫣
Certain words in the English language, mainly profanity, is getting automodded by the server. Messages with these words in them are being prevented from being sent in the first place.
Here is an example.

Here is also how to modify the AutoMod settings on Discord.
It's under "Safety Setup" under the "Moderation" category.
I hope this helps you figure stuff out, and thanks for giving us a response and hearing us out

Understood, the original intention is to avoid unnecessary conflicts caused by individual users using insulting language, as similar frictions have occurred in different chat channels before🙏 

At present, we have followed up on the actual usage and turned off some blocking options. If you have any other questions, please feel free to contact me. We are happy to create a harmonious, fun, and enjoyable community for players🫂 🌹
Thank you again for your answer💗

Thank you so much for the quick response and action! (Despite your busy schedule <:scared2:1356085635374383145> )

Though I understand the intention, blocking profanity is one of the least effective ways of stopping conflicts from being sparked in the community <:dead:1356082627509092372>  - these are sparked by malicious actors and the words they use are simply conduits of their intentions, which is what should be properly monitored since people can easily inflict hurt on others even with words that are innocuous in a vacuum.

We appreciate your hard work, and thanks again for responding promptly <:wish:1356084702468899117>
Thank you, we will make decisions more carefully in the future❤️
For some reason the art in the skin preview is now very blurry/low quality
Thank you for your feedback. We are currently considering a solution to this issue and are trying to optimize the display style and resolution of the portrait<:please:1356053110375714817> 🙏
✅「Answered」Low quality in skin preview

感觉5771虽然有很多肉鸽元素，但是却没有真正意义上肉鸽玩法。
造物，地图事件等并没有给人核心的肉鸽体验，关卡地图也是线性地图，没有随机的感觉，不足以成为核心玩法。
建议出一个真正的肉鸽玩法，给人核心肉鸽体验，（包括路径选择，随机事件，构筑选择啥的）局外成长也不是不行（类似多流派天赋树）。
让人有再玩一把，再玩一把的快感，高重玩性也是肉鸽游戏的主要特点。这样还能节省产能，不然长草期太无聊了，天天打活动落地战一点意思都没。
thread_title: 能不能出一个真正的想随时赌一把的那种的肉鸽玩法
